title: Nord (Imperial)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:Colonel_Nord.jpg]] |name=Nord |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] (38 GrS), [[Tarkin (superweapon)|''Tarkin'']][[Star Wars (1977) 52|''Star Wars'' (1977) 52]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Prime the ion cannon! We'll blow those Rebels clear out of the galaxy!|Colonel Nord|}} '''Nord''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Colonel/Legends|colonel]] stationed on the [[Tarkin (superweapon)|''Tarkin'']] superweapon as a member of the bridge crew. He became involved in a conspiracy to assassinate [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], due to his frequent executions of officers for minor failures. The colonel gave the order to fire the [[Superlaser/Legends|superlaser]] aboard the ''Tarkin'' when a strike team of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] saboteurs was attempting to escape, but [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] had sabotaged the firing mechanism, which caused the superlaser to explode and destroy the station. Nord and everyone else aboard was killed. ==Biography== {{Quote|And your earlier directive, sir, to have all personnel removed from the vicinity of the main power reactor―is that still in effect?"
"Indeed, colonel. I shall see to the security of that sector personally.|Nord and Darth Vader|}} Nord was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] Imperial officer who held the rank of [[Colonel/Legends|colonel]] and was stationed aboard the ''Tarkin'' superweapon, a large space station with a [[Superlaser/Legends|superlaser]] similar to that of the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]], as a member of its bridge crew in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. He became involved with a group of officers planning to kill [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] due to the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord's]] ruthlessness when dealing with mistakes made by his subordinates. Nord met with his fellow conspirators, including [[General/Legends|General]] [[Biel]], not long after the Dark Lord's arrival and agreed to take action against him. When Vader planned to confront the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], a member of a Rebel strike team that [[Infiltration of the Tarkin|infiltrated]] the ''Tarkin'', Nord took advantage of this opportunity and opened an airlock near the Dark Lord. He hoped that the Sith would be pulled out into the vacuum of space. But Vader called upon the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] to aid him in surviving the pull of air, making it back onto the ''Tarkin''. Nord realized that this failure had given him away, but he gained a temporary reprieve as Vader was focused on capturing the escaping Rebels. Several [[TIE series/Legends|TIE Series]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], including one [[TIE Advanced x1/Legends|TIE Advanced x1]] piloted by Vader, engaged the Rebels' craft. However, the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] intervened, and the engagement had left Vader's craft crippled. Seeing another opportunity to assassinate Vader, Nord ordered the ''Tarkin''{{'s}} superlaser fired at the Rebels, hoping Vader would be caught in the blast. But the Rebels had sabotaged the firing mechanism, causing the ''Tarkin'' to self-destruct, ending both the conspiracy and the officers' lives, including the colonel's. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|General Biel, I think the time has come. We must act soon."
"Colonel, I couldn't agree with you more! Too many of our fellow officers have died at the Dark Lord's whim, all for making mistakes that anyone human could've understood.|Colonel Nord and [[General/Legends|General]] [[Biel]] discuss the conspiracy|}} Nord appeared to be a compliant Imperial officer to Darth Vader, but he was secretly part of a group of Imperials aboard the ''Tarkin'' that wanted to kill the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]] to stop his frequent executions of their fellow officers. He also disliked the Rebels and wanted to eliminate them as well as Vader. The colonel had fair skin and wore a standard grey [[Imperial officer's uniform/Legends|Imperial officer's uniform]]. ==Behind the scenes== Colonel Nord first appeared in the fifty-second issue of the [[Marvel Comics|Marvel]] [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'']] comic series, [[Star Wars (1977) 52|''To Take The Tarkin'']], published in 1981, and was later mentioned in the 2011 short story ''[[Vader Adrift]]'', which was published in the ''[[Star Wars Insider Special Edition 2012]]''. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 52|''Star Wars'' (1977) 52]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 52}} {{1st}} *{{InsiderCite|Special Edition 2012|Vader Adrift|reprint=1}} {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Nord (Imperialer) }} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Officers of the Galactic Empire]]
